authority_surfaces.label: current_phase
authority_surfaces.description: Current canonical phase pointer, allowed package class, and tactical family lock state

authority_surfaces.label: phase_gate_status
authority_surfaces.description: Per-phase gate classifications and blocking reasons (open / closed_ratified / materially_implemented_open_governance)

authority_surfaces.label: next_package_class
authority_surfaces.description: Currently allowed package class and transition history

authority_surfaces.label: runtime_contract_version
authority_surfaces.description: Runtime primitive surface and contract version fingerprint
supersedes: framework/ module versions (code only; no governance ratification)

authority_surfaces.label: tactical_family_classification
authority_surfaces.description: EO/ED/MC/LOB/ORT/PGS family lock state and unlock preconditions

authority_surfaces.label: schema_contract_registry
authority_surfaces.description: Active vs legacy_frozen schema classification for framework modules

authority_surfaces.label: promotion_manifest_legacy
authority_surfaces.description: Legacy tactical release authority (frozen pending migration)

authority_surfaces.label: narrative_roadmap_docs
authority_surfaces.description: docs/claude-code-roadmap.md and related narrative roadmap documents (advisory only)

conflicts.description: current_phase.json reports current_phase_id=0 (governance_source_of_truth_reconciliation, open) but next_package_class.json reflects Phase 7 closure (current_allowed_class=ratification_only). Phase 0 has been procedurally bypassed without a formal closure record.

phase_gate_status.json shows Phase 0 as 'open' while Phase 7 is 'closed_ratified'. Phases 1 through 7 were closed without Phase 0 (governance_source_of_truth_reconciliation) receiving a closure record, leaving an unresolved foundational gate.

config/promotion_manifest.json (legacy tactical release authority) still exists on disk and has not been migrated or formally retired. It supersedes nothing but is itself superseded by governance/ JSON surfaces per ADR 0001. Migration is explicitly deferred per phase_gate_status.json followup note.

Package P0-01 required 3 input document(s) that are not present on disk: revised_target_architecture_handoff_v4.docx, revised_target_architecture_handoff_v7.docx, control_window_architecture_adoption_packet.md. Inventory was produced from existing on-disk governance/ state only. These docs may contain target-architecture claims that conflict with current governance state; their absence is itself a documentation gap.

recommended_authority_order.label: canonical_roadmap
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Defines the phase structure that all other surfaces reference; must be correct before any closure decision.

recommended_authority_order.label: phase_gate_status
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Per-phase gate classifications are the reconciliation surface for Phase 0 closure; must reflect real state.

recommended_authority_order.label: current_phase
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Should be updated to reflect Phase 0 closure once closure evidence is ratified; currently stale.

recommended_authority_order.label: next_package_class
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Allowed package class derives from current phase; update after current_phase is reconciled.

recommended_authority_order.label: runtime_contract_version
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Phase 1 hardening requires this surface to be explicitly ratified; downstream of Phase 0 closure.

recommended_authority_order.label: tactical_family_classification
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Family unlock criteria depend on phase authority being correct; reconcile after Phase 0/1 closure.

recommended_authority_order.label: schema_contract_registry
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Schema active/frozen classification is stable; update as new modules are adopted.

recommended_authority_order.label: promotion_manifest_legacy
recommended_authority_order.rationale: Formally retire or migrate after Phase 0/1 authority surfaces are closed.

phase0_gate_status.blocking_reason: machine-readable authority artifacts are being introduced by RECON-W1 and have not yet been ratified as closed
phase0_gate_status.assessment: OPEN — Phase 0 has no closure record. The governance_source_of_truth_reconciliation phase requires an explicit closure package before the authority surface inventory is considered fully ratified.
